title: Goa Beach Getaway
shortDescription: Relax on sun-kissed beaches and enjoy the vibrant nightlife of Goa.
overview: Experience the perfect blend of Portuguese heritage, vibrant beach parties, and serene shores. This 5-day Goa trip offers relaxation and adventure.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Goa
itinerary.description: Transfer to hotel and relax by the beach.

itinerary.title: North Goa Tour
itinerary.description: Visit Fort Aguada, Baga, and Calangute beaches.

itinerary.title: South Goa Heritage
itinerary.description: Explore Old Goa churches and spice plantations.

itinerary.title: Dudhsagar Excursion
itinerary.description: Day trip to the majestic Dudhsagar waterfalls.
